meaning: n.[音]曼陀林(一种琵琶乐器)
examples: Dad sure could play that Mandolin!
That really crappy mandolin music that midgets enjoy dancing to?
Here, she sings and plays mandolin with star banjo player Bela Fleck.
But it lacks any visible subject matter: no discernible woman, nary a mandolin.
Monroe's own off beat, blues drenched mandolin break is borrowed from no one.
